name: batch_generate
description: Generate multiple PDFs from a single template with different data sets in one API call. This is more efficient than calling generate_pdf multiple times. Provide an array of submission objects, each with its own data. The response returns an array of submission IDs that you can track individually via get_submission. Useful for generating bulk documents like payslips, certificates, or mailing labels.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the template to use for all generated PDFs.

parameters.name: submissions
parameters.description: Array of submission objects. Each object must have a 'data' key with the field values for that PDF. Optionally include 'metadata' and 'test' per submission.

parameters.name: test
parameters.description: Set to true to make all submissions in this batch test submissions with watermarks. Default is false.
